_comment_timezone: Vercel Cron schedules are in UTC. KST = UTC+9. The mapping below: cart-recovery 09:00 UTC = 18:00 KST · subscription-reminders 00:00 UTC = 09:00 KST · subscription-charge 19:00 UTC = 04:00 KST (다음날) · restock-alerts 01:00 UTC = 10:00 KST · birthday-coupons 00:00 UTC = 09:00 KST. 시간대 변경 시 이 주석도 함께 갱신.
